title: Consumption Tax Calculator
description: Calculate tax-inclusive and tax-exclusive prices instantly. Supports Japan's 10% standard rate and 8% reduced rate. Free online tool.

howToUse.label: Select a calculation mode
howToUse.description: Choose from Pre-tax → Inclusive, Inclusive → Pre-tax, or Inclusive → Tax amount.

howToUse.label: Choose the tax rate
howToUse.description: Select 10% (standard rate) or 8% (reduced rate for food and subscriptions).

howToUse.label: Enter the amount and read the results
howToUse.description: Results appear instantly as you type. Use the Copy buttons next to each value to copy numbers to your clipboard.

faq.question: How is the consumption tax calculated?
faq.answer: Tax-inclusive = Pre-tax × 1.1 (for 10%) or × 1.08 (for 8%). To reverse from inclusive to exclusive: Pre-tax = Inclusive ÷ 1.1, with the fractional yen rounded down.

faq.question: What items qualify for the 8% reduced tax rate in Japan?
faq.answer: The 8% reduced rate applies to food and beverages (excluding alcohol and restaurant dining-in) and subscription newspapers. Restaurant meals and alcohol are taxed at the standard 10%.

faq.question: How are fractions handled in reverse calculation?
faq.answer: This tool rounds down (floors) the pre-tax amount when converting from tax-inclusive prices. Under Japanese consumption tax law, businesses may choose floor, ceiling, or round-half-up; floor is most common.

faq.question: Does this support the Invoice System (Invoice Seido)?
faq.answer: Japan's Qualified Invoice System (インボイス制度) started in October 2023. This tool performs basic tax calculations but does not generate compliant invoices or handle registration numbers.
